themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "During marches, Judah's three tribes led, followed by Gershonites and Merarites carrying tabe...". Word-study detail reinforces "כֵּ֣ן: - properly, set upright; hence (figuratively as adjective) just; but usually (as adver...".
